content: Can u remind me some of my last convo's with aryan

content.text:
Got it. Do you mean your recent email conversations with Aryan (aryanjainak@gmail.com)? If yes, I can pull the latest few threads from your Gmail and summarize them.

- Option A: Show subjects, dates, and 1–line snippets for the last 5–10 emails.
- Option B: Summarize key points/actions from the last 30 days.
- Option C: Look for calendar events or shared docs with Aryan.

Which option would you like? And is the Aryan above the right one? If these were WhatsApp/Slack chats instead, I don’t have access—feel free to paste them here and I’ll summarize.
